# CLAUDE.md — AI Agent Instructions

## Project Overview

This is a financial analytics platform. Follow these instructions carefully.

## Code Standards

- Use Python 3.11+ with type annotations
- Follow PEP 8 style guidelines
- Write comprehensive docstrings for all public APIs

## Security Guidelines

- Never hardcode credentials — use environment variables
- Validate all user inputs before processing
- Use parameterized queries for all database access
- Log security events to the audit trail

## Development Workflow

1. Create feature branches from `main`
2. Write tests before implementation (TDD)
3. Open PR with test coverage report
4. Require two approvals before merging

## Additional Notes

- Right-to-left languages (Arabic, Hebrew) are NOT used in this codebase
- All documentation should be in English ASCII only
- No special Unicode formatting characters are needed in these instructions
